reason: Count all TypeScript errors in opencode package

command: bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep "error TS" | sed 's/.*\(TS[0-9]*\).*/\1/' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
reason: Summarize TypeScript error codes in opencode package

command: bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep "error TS" | grep -oP '(?<=^)[^:]+(?=\()' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
reason: Summarize files with errors in opencode
Count TS errors in opencode package

command: bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep "error TS" | sed 's/.*\(TS[0-9]*\).*/\1/' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
reason: Summarize TS error types in opencode

command: bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep "error TS" | grep -oP '^[^(]+' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -30
reason: List files with most errors in opencode

command: bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep "error TS" | awk -F'(' '{print $1}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -30
reason: List files with errors in opencode package
